evals.name: shop-from-current-meal-plan
evals.prompt: It's Saturday morning — please do the weekly Woolworths shop. Use the most recent aggregated shopping list from my Iris 'meal-plans' set (the diagram named 'Week of 2026-05-25 — shopping list'). Walk me through any ambiguous picks or out-of-stocks; when you're done give me a summary so I can review and submit in the browser.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs preflight (./scripts/doctor.sh), reads the named diagram via the Iris MCP, parses ~15-30 items, calls woolies search + scripts/pick.py per line, prompts the user via AskUserQuestion only when the picker returns ambiguous/out-of-stock, and ends with a table of added/skipped/substituted items + an instruction to open woolworths.co.nz to review and submit. The skill does NOT attempt to place the order.

assertions.text: Calls ./scripts/doctor.sh at preflight before any other woolies command
Reads the aggregated shopping list via an Iris MCP get_diagram or list_diagrams + get_diagram call
Calls scripts/pick.py with --want JSON containing qty, unit, and optional hints — never picks a SKU itself
Uses AskUserQuestion only when the picker returns ambiguous=true or out_of_stock=true
Ends with woolies cart list --json and a summary table
Does NOT attempt cart checkout or order submission
Hands off to the user with an instruction to open woolworths.co.nz to review

evals.name: first-run-not-installed
evals.prompt: Do my Woolies shop — I have a meal plan called 'this week' in Iris.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs ./scripts/doctor.sh, sees reason='not_installed', walks the user through running ./scripts/install.sh, surfaces any Linux system-lib install instructions verbatim if the installer exits 2, then continues only after the user confirms install is complete and woolies login succeeded.

assertions.text: Reads doctor.sh JSON output and branches on reason='not_installed'
Instructs the user to run ./scripts/install.sh (does not attempt to install woolies via pip directly)
Tells the user about the woolies login step and ~25s Camoufox download on first run
Does NOT proceed to search/cart operations until preflight is green

evals.name: stock-out-with-substitution
evals.prompt: Do my shopping. Use meal plan diagram id `mp-2026-05-25`. If anything is out of stock, suggest a substitute but don't pick anything without asking me.
evals.expected_output: Skill processes the list, and on any line where scripts/pick.py returns out_of_stock=true it uses AskUserQuestion to offer the top 2 OOS candidates as substitution alternatives (or 'skip'), then either calls woolies cart add with the user's chosen alternative SKU or omits the line from the cart. Reports each substituted item in the final summary.

assertions.text: Detects scripts/pick.py returning out_of_stock=true and asks the user before any substitution
Never auto-substitutes without explicit user choice
The summary table marks substituted items clearly (showing both original and chosen SKU)
